name: Chunky Minestrone
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Carrot, about 1 medium, sliced lengthwise and halved
1 1/4 cups Nonfat Vegetable Chicken Broth, low sodium
29 ounces No-Salt-Added Whole Tomatoes, undrained, chopped
2 cups Zucchini, about 1 medium, halved lengthwise and sliced
10 ounces Frozen Chopped Spinach, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large Dutch oven, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add onion, carrot, and garlic; sauté for 3 minutes.
3. Add rice and the next four ingredients (water, broth, tomatoes, and Italian seasoning); bring to a boil.
4. Cover and reduce heat, then simmer for 20 minutes.
5. Stir in zucchini and the remaining three ingredients (spinach, beans, and pepper).
6. Cook an additional 5 minutes.
7. Ladle into individual soup bowls and sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
Yield: 7 servings (1 1/2 cups each)
According to the original recipe per serving:
Calories: 187
Fat: 4.3g
Carbohydrates: 29.1g
Protein: 9g
Sodium: 375mg
% Daily Value: 21%
